name: Parallel word frequency count across 20 text files
prompt: There are 20 text files (text_00.txt through text_19.txt) in the current directory. Write a Python script parallel_wordcount.py that uses multiprocessing to count word frequencies across all files in parallel. Each worker should process one file and return its word counts. Merge all results into a single frequency dictionary. Write the result to word_counts.json as a JSON object mapping words to their total counts across all files. The script MUST use multiprocessing (Pool or ProcessPoolExecutor). Run the script after writing it.

criteria.description: word_counts.json exists and is valid JSON
Script source uses multiprocessing or ProcessPoolExecutor

origin.notes: content variant r2 of parallel-wordcount — same task type, same structure (20 files x 500 words, 90-word vocabulary), different text corpus
